description: Working on hospital projects across Delhi NCR and Northeast India, contributing to the design planning stage and the development of sections and elevations. The role has deepened my understanding of healthcare planning, statutory requirements, and translating complex programmes into coherent architectural drawings.

Contributed to a variety of interior design projects, focusing on beauty salons, small cafés, and residential apartment redesigns. This experience enhanced my understanding of interior design principles, client-driven customization, and the practical execution of design ideas.

Currently pursuing my Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch) at the National Institute of Technology, Hamirpur — one of India's premier technical institutions. The programme has given me a strong foundation in architectural design and construction technology while encouraging critical thinking and creativity.

Relevant coursework: Building Construction, Architectural Design.

Led campus decoration initiatives for the annual Nimbus 2k23 and Nimbus 2k24 fests. Responsibilities included wall paintings, thematic installations, and designing the entrance gate to the fest grounds.
Built a strong academic foundation and nurtured an interest in creative thinking, problem-solving, and design. These years instilled in me the values of discipline, curiosity, and perseverance.
